description.ko: 라벤더빛 성진이 보이지 않는 우주의 깊이 위로 흐르는 고요한 VOID-3 심연.
description.en: A silent VOID-3 abyss where lavender star dust drifts above unseen cosmic depths.

prompt: VOID-3 cosmic deep, an immense vertical starless chasm opening between layered nebula curtains, as if the universe has split into a silent abyss. Dense fields of silver-lavender star dust drift in slow tidal bands across the foreground, with thousands of tiny #E6E6FA pinprick stars half-buried in translucent vapor. Far below, faint #3D1A78 ultraviolet light glows from unseen depths, outlining colossal, fractured sheets of #0D0221 darkness and thin #7B68EE plasma veins along their edges. No planets, no spacecraft, no central black hole; the composition feels like standing at the rim of infinite space, mysterious, majestic, cosmic horror scale, ultra-detailed deep space photography, high particle density, soft volumetric haze, restrained contrast, very slow celestial motion.
